consent-date-format.description: Consent History date/time formatting is hardcoded per platform and ignores device locale & clock settings; on iOS it is also inconsistent across flows (day-first, 24h, lowercase pm, etc.), so this is report-only (strict:false) until dev makes the format consistent

reminder-permission-config.description: Training Reminder: onboarding notification-permission answer changes the persisted reminder config (per-day toggles & time visibility) despite an identical in-app choice

neurobooster-cancel-toggle.description: NeuroBooster: Android and iOS persist a different toggle state after the user agrees on the NB screen then cancels the OS notification prompt
